title: Parkio Daily for Sunday, May 24, 2026
teaser: Soarin' Across America and Rock 'n' Roller Coaster with the Muppets both opened early this week. Check ride wait times and plan your day.

rides.name: Soarin' Across America
rides.note: Just opened; early morning windows likely offer shorter waits

rides.name: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring the Muppets
rides.note: Reimagined attraction now open; ride early to avoid buildup

rides.name: TRON Lightcycle / Run
rides.note: First-hour waits typically stay manageable before noon

bignews.title: Soarin' Across America Opens Early at EPCOT
bignews.body: The new patriotic flight film debuted May 22, four days ahead of schedule. Celebrating the USA's 250th anniversary, the attraction features all-new scenes over American landmarks and a distinct salute to national pride.

parkioInsight.text: Early openings tend to pull guests into The Land pavilion during morning hours. Riding Test Track or Frozen Ever After before 11am usually avoids the Soarin' spillover crowds.

bignews.title: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Reimagined with The Muppets
bignews.body: Hollywood Studios' thrill coaster reopened with Electric Mayhem band theming, multiple song tracks, and new Easter eggs throughout the queue and ride. Reviews praise the blend of humor and high-speed thrills.

parkioInsight.text: Sunset Boulevard often fills by mid-morning with the new coaster draw. Riding within the first 90 minutes of park open or after 7pm typically keeps waits under 40 minutes.

topstories.title: Bluey's Wild World Preview at Animal Kingdom
topstories.body: Disney shared a first look at the new Bluey-themed experience debuting alongside Cool Kids' Summer on May 26. The addition uses a virtual queue and brings Bingo and Bluey characters to the park for the first time.

parkioInsight.text: Virtual queue slots for new additions often fill within minutes of park open. Joining the queue at 7am on your My Disney Experience app usually secures an entry window before noon.

topstories.title: The Walt Disney Studios Land Now Open at Hollywood Studios
topstories.body: The new courtyard area featuring character meets with Pua and Thumper, plus FØØD by Swedish Chef, opened earlier than expected this week. Hidden details throughout the land reference classic Disney animation and studio history.

parkioInsight.text: Character meet queues in new lands tend to be lightest during parade times or in the final two hours before park close. Visiting after 6pm often means shorter waits.

topstories.title: Memorial Day BBQ Pork Chop Debuts at Homecomin'
topstories.body: Chef Art Smith's Homecomin' at Disney Springs added a limited-time blueberry BBQ pork chop for Memorial Day week. Early reviews call it one of the best dinners currently available at the resort.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-time menu items at popular Disney Springs spots often sell out by evening. Booking a 5pm or earlier reservation usually ensures availability before the dinner rush.

icymi.title: Disney Experiences Wins 10 Telly Awards
icymi.body: Disney Parks content earned recognition across video and digital storytelling categories, including gold honors for Disneyland Handcrafted and collaborations with Dude Perfect and Kylie Kelce.

icymi.title: Security Escorts Family from Magic Kingdom After Parade Spot Dispute
icymi.body: A confrontation over viewing spots for Disney Starlight parade on Main Street, U.S.A., escalated to the point that security removed one family from the park. The incident briefly delayed the nighttime parade.

spotlight.title: Multiple Closures End This Week at Walt Disney World
spotlight.body: Several refurbishments wrap up May 26, including Liberty Square Riverboat, Rafiki's Planet Watch, and pools at Beach Club, Yacht Club, and Pop Century. Cool Kids' Summer also kicks off the same day, bringing new entertainment and the Bluey experience to Animal Kingdom.

parkioInsight.text: Reopening days often draw curious crowds to newly refreshed attractions. Visiting those spots mid-week or after the holiday weekend usually offers lighter waits than opening day.
